name: DIAMOND HILL INVESTMENT GROUP INC
summary: Diamond Hill Investment Group, Inc. (DHIL) derives revenue from investment advisory and fund administration services through its wholly-owned subsidiary Diamond Hill Capital Management, Inc. (DHCM). DHCM manages open-end mutual funds, an ETF, a closed-end fund, a private fund, separately managed accounts, collective investment trusts, sub-advised funds, and model delivery programs. The firm employs valuation-disciplined active portfolio management and fundamental bottom-up research, serving institutionally oriented investors across equity and other asset classes.

products.name: Diamond Hill Funds
products.description: Series of open-end mutual funds managed and administered by DHCM.

products.name: Diamond Hill Large Cap Concentrated ETF
products.description: An exchange-traded fund managed by DHCM.

products.name: Diamond Hill Securitized Credit Fund (DHSC)
products.description: A closed-end registered investment company managed by DHCM.

products.name: Diamond Hill Micro Cap Fund, LP (DHMF)
products.description: A private fund for which DHCM provides investment advisory and related services.

products.name: Separately Managed Accounts (SMAs)
products.description: Individually managed investment accounts offered by DHCM.

products.name: Collective Investment Trusts (CITs)
products.description: Pooled investment vehicles managed by DHCM.

products.name: Model Delivery Programs
products.description: Investment model portfolios delivered to clients by DHCM.

partnerships.description: Proposed merger agreement signed December 10, 2025; DHIL to become wholly-owned subsidiary of First Eagle upon completion.
